report.summary: Researched, wrote, and scaffolded two new learn guides: MegaETH Real-Time L2 Guide (824 lines) and Story Protocol IP Tokenization Guide (763 lines), both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE with full SEO metadata and structured data.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: MegaETH: Launched mainnet Feb 9, 2026 as first 'real-time blockchain' — 100K+ TPS via Streaming EVM architecture. Backed by Paradigm and Vitalik Buterin. 50+ apps at launch including Aave/GMX via Chainlink. SALT architecture keeps entire state in RAM. 39M transactions on day one.

Story Protocol: Purpose-built L1 for IP tokenization. EVM-compatible with Programmable IP License (PIL) smart contracts. 'Chapter 2' pivot toward AI-native infrastructure for $70-80T IP economy. IP Vault launching on mainnet 2026 for confidential AI training data. $IP token ~$500M market cap but <$100/day on-chain revenue. Token unlock delayed to August 2026.

sections.title: Content Created
items: MegaETH Guide 2026 — 824-line comprehensive learn guide covering Streaming EVM architecture, SALT state management, parallel node roles, L2 comparison table, ecosystem overview, MEGA token, risks, and getting started guide with 6 FAQs

Story Protocol IP Tokenization Guide — 763-line comprehensive learn guide covering IP Assets, Programmable IP License, Proof-of-Creativity protocol, IP Vault AI integration, $IP tokenomics, comparison vs traditional IP management, ecosystem use cases, risks, and getting started with 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: MegaETH: Title 'MegaETH Guide: Real-Time Ethereum L2 Explained 2026 | degen0x' (58 chars), target keyword 'megaeth guide', Article + FAQ schemas (6 questions), OG/Twitter cards, canonical URL

Story Protocol: Title 'Story Protocol IP Tokenization Guide: The AI-Native L1 2026 | degen0x', target keyword 'story protocol guide', Article + FAQ schemas (6 questions), OG/Twitter cards, canonical URL
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
Internal links to existing degen0x pages (Monad guide, L2 scaling, RWA guide, AI tokens, etc.)
